WebCouponBannerInfoText:
The coupon is only available to customers who have never installed the ABOUT YOU app on their device and have never registered with their email address in the ABOUT YOU app.
The new customer coupon is only available in the ABOUT YOU app, is non-transferable and can only be redeemed in connection with an order at ABOUT YOU. It is valid once until the validity date stated on the coupon and is automatically deducted from the invoice when the coupon is activated during the order process. The coupon can only be used on selected products; the coupon expires if the product is returned. Cash payment is not possible. The coupon is not valid in conjunction with other discounts or vouchers and does not count towards EXTRA discounts.
Log in to activate your exclusive Coupon: Log in to activate your exclusive Coupon Discounts!
Irrespective of consenting to the newsle: Irrespective of consenting to the newsletter, you will receive product recommendations for similar goods by email based on your purchases (see privacy policy), which you can object to at any time free of charge via email or customer service (Contact).

tradedoubler_feature_based_consent_body:
You retain the right to revoke your consent, in whole or in part, at any time with effect for the future by modifying your preferences in the Preference Center (Consent Management). For details, see our Privacy Policy and Imprint/Legal Notice. Your revocation does not change the legality of the data processing carried out on the basis of your consent until the revocation.

With your consent, we would like to store and/or retrieve information on your end device (e.g., IP address, user ID, browser information, device identifiers) and utilize and share this information with our partners for the subsequent purposes: displaying personalized advertisements and content ("personalized ads and content"); for ad and content measurement, to better understand you ("market research").

Please note: By consenting to Google Analytics 4 you agree to the collection of additional personal data beyond what is necessary for collecting PAYBACK points. However, without your consent, we cannot collect the information necessary for collecting PAYBACK points and share it with our partners.

You can find detailed information regarding the services and the partners, we share the information with by clicking on Tradedoubler, Google Analytics 4, and Store and/or retrieve information on your device or within the Preference Center (Consent Management).
We can remind you as soon as the product: We can remind you as soon as the product is back in stock.
